title: ononis hircina var. spinosohircina
intro: Ononis hircina var. spinosohircina, also known as the spiny wild medic or spiny restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and relieving pain. The health benefits of Ononis hircina var. spinosohircina include its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and gout. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
